ddls:
CREATE TABLE "problems" (
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each problem */,
  "problem_title" TEXT /* Title of the problem */,
  "acceptance_rate" REAL /* Acceptance rate of the problem (percentage of accepted solutions) */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the problem (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "average_runtime" REAL /* Average runtime of accepted solutions */,
  "problem_url" TEXT /* URL to the problem on LeetCode */,
  "problem_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the problem */,
  "problem_example" TEXT /* Example inputs and outputs for the problem */,
  "problem_solution" TEXT /* Sample solution to the problem */,
  "problem_discussion_url" TEXT /* URL to the community discussion page for the problem */,
  "problem_video_tutorial_url" TEXT /* URL to a video tutorial for the problem */,
  "problem_hints" TEXT /* Hints to help solve the problem */,
  "problem_tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for the problem */,
  "problem_difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the problem_difficulties table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_problem_difficulty_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_difficulty_id") REFERENCES problem_difficulties ("difficulty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problems_difficulty FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty") REFERENCES problem_difficulties ("difficulty_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, team leader, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* User's bio or profile description */,
  "user_profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* User's current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_problems" (
  "user_problem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-problem interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made by the user */,
  "solved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the problem was solved */,
  "last_attempted" TEXT /* Date of the last attempt */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to solve the problem */,
  "user_problem_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments the user has made about the problem */,
  "user_problem_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user for the problem (1-5) */,
  "user_problem_last_viewed" TEXT /* Date the user last viewed the problem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_problems_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_problems_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user-problem interaction */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time of the submission */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code submitted by the user */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the submission (e.g., accepted, wrong answer) */,
  "runtime" REAL /* Runtime of the submission */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage of the submission */,
  "submission_language" TEXT /* Programming language used for the submission */,
  "submission_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the submission */,
  "submission_test_cases_passed" INTEGER /* Number of test cases passed */,
  "submission_test_cases_failed" INTEGER /* Number of test cases failed */,
  "submission_total_test_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of test cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_problem_id") REFERENCES user_problems ("user_problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., Array, Hash Table) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_tag_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_tag_mapping_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES problem_tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_tag_mapping_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_author_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table indicating the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_versions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_versions_version_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the discussion */,
  "discussion_date" TEXT /* Date of the discussion */,
  "discussion_content" TEXT /* Content of the discussion */,
  "discussion_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the discussion has received */,
  "discussion_replies" INTEGER /* Number of replies to the discussion */,
  "discussion_is_pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the discussion is pinned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_discussions_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the problem */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_ratings_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, team leader, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_difficulties" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level (e.g., Easy, Medium, Hard) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "difficulty_filter" TEXT /* Difficulty levels to filter by */,
  "tag_filter" TEXT /* Tags to filter by */,
  "sort_by" TEXT /* Sorting criteria (e.g., acceptance rate, average runtime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first user */,
  "user_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second user */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "collaboration_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the collaboration (e.g., problem solved, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_collaborations_user_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_collaborations_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_collaborations_user_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "feedback_content" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, bug report) */,
  "feedback_response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "problem_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "problem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the problem */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the problem */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "review_content" TEXT /* Content of the review */,
  "review_likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "review_dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "review_is_pinned" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the review is pinned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_problem_reviews_problem_id FOREIGN KEY ("problem_id") REFERENCES problems ("problem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date the achievement was earned */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "achievement_type" TEXT /* Type of achievement (e.g., milestone, challenge) */,
  "achievement_points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_achievements_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_content" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., problem recommendation, solution accepted) */,
  "notification_action_url" TEXT /* URL to take action on the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
